coreMeaning.cn: 玩耍时间；游戏时间（连字符变体）
coreMeaning.en: time set aside for playing; variant spelling of playtime

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: play(玩耍)+time(时间) → 专门用来玩耍的时间

coreMeaning.en: possessive form of play; belonging to a play

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: play+'s → 这出戏剧的（所有格形式）

coreMeaning.cn: 干盐湖；盐碱地；沙滩（西班牙语借词）

morphemes.meaning: flat; beach; dry lake bed (Spanish playa = beach)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: playa → 西班牙语沙滩，在英语中指干盐湖底部

coreMeaning.cn: 可演奏的；可玩的；适合比赛的
coreMeaning.en: able to be played; fit for play or performance

morphemes.meaning: to engage in play or performance

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: play+able → 能玩的，可以演奏的

coreMeaning.en: the reproduction of recorded sound or picture; the act of playing back recorded material

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: play(播放)+back(回) → 将录制内容再次播放

coreMeaning.en: plural of playback; multiple reproductions of recorded material

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: playback+s → 多次回放

coreMeaning.cn: 戏剧节目单；演出说明书

morphemes.meaning: a notice or list; a printed document

coreMeaning.en: plural of playbill; multiple theatrical programs or posters

coreMeaning.en: a book of plays or scripts; a book of strategies and tactics

morphemes.meaning: a theatrical work; a game plan

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: play(策略/戏剧)+book(书) → 包含策略或剧本的书

coreMeaning.en: a wealthy man who spends time seeking pleasure

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: play(享乐)+boy(男人) → 以享乐为主的富裕男性

coreMeaning.en: plural of playboy; multiple wealthy pleasure-seeking men

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: playboy+s → 多位花花公子

coreMeaning.en: past tense of play; engaged in play, performed, or competed

morphemes.meaning: to engage in activity for enjoyment

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: play+ed → 已经玩了/演奏了

coreMeaning.cn: 运动员；玩家；演员；演奏者

morphemes.meaning: to engage in sport or performance

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: play+er → 参与游戏、运动或表演的人

coreMeaning.en: possessive form of player; belonging to a player

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: player+'s → 玩家的（东西）

coreMeaning.en: plural of player; multiple participants in a game or performance

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: player+s → 众多玩家/运动员

coreMeaning.en: a person who plays with another; a playmate

playfellow+s → 多个玩伴

coreMeaning.cn: 爱嬉戏的；开玩笑的；幽默的

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: play+ful → 充满玩耍精神的，爱嬉戏的

coreMeaning.en: the quality of being playful; fun-loving nature

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: playful+ness → 爱玩耍的品质

coreMeaning.en: a person who goes to the theater regularly

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: play(戏剧)+goer(前往者) → 经常去看戏的人
playgoer+s → 一群戏迷

playgroup+s → 多个游戏小组

morphemes.meaning: to engage in play or performance

coreMeaning.en: a list of songs, videos, or other media items to be played in order

coreMeaning.en: plural of playlist; multiple ordered collections of media
